ddls:
CREATE TABLE "catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog */,
  "catalog_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalog */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catalog */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the catalog was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the catalog */,
  "encoding_type" TEXT /* Type of encoding used in the catalog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms" (
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS */,
  "dbms_name" TEXT /* Name of the DBMS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the DBMS */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the DBMS entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the DBMS entry */,
  "introduced_version" TEXT /* Version of the DBMS that introduced the functionality */,
  "encoding_type" TEXT /* Type of encoding supported by the DBMS */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the DBMS is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "function_body" TEXT /* Body of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the function was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the function */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the function */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the function is currently active */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* JSON array of function IDs that this function depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support entry */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DBMS */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Level of support provided by the DBMS for the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the support entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the support entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the support entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_support_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_support_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Requirement for the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the requirement */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the requirement is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_requirements_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row that was modified */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* JSON object of the old values */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* JSON object of the new values */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
